mapper.select: SELECT METRIC_CODE, METRIC_NAME, UNIT, CATEGORY, HAS_THRESHOLD, SORT_ORDER FROM B_METRIC_TYPE_T ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
SELECT METRIC_CODE FROM R_MODEL_METRIC_T WHERE MODEL_ID = #{modelId} ORDER BY METRIC_CODE

SELECT METRIC_CODE FROM R_MODEL_METRIC_T mm JOIN r_device_t d ON d.MODEL_ID = mm.MODEL_ID WHERE d.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL
UNION
SELECT METRIC_CODE FROM R_DEV_CODE_METRIC_T dcm JOIN r_model_t m ON m.DEV_CODE_ID = dcm.DEV_CODE_ID JOIN r_device_t d ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID WHERE d.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL
UNION
SELECT METRIC_CODE FROM R_DEV_CODE_METRIC_T dcm JOIN b_dev_code_t dc ON dcm.DEV_CODE_ID = dc.DEV_CODE_ID JOIN b_dev_code_t dc2 ON dc2.PARENT_DEV_CODE_ID = dc.DEV_CODE_ID JOIN r_model_t m ON m.DEV_CODE_ID = dc2.DEV_CODE_ID JOIN r_device_t d ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID WHERE d.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL
ORDER BY METRIC_CODE
SELECT METRIC_CODE FROM R_DEV_CODE_METRIC_T WHERE DEV_CODE_ID = #{devCodeId} ORDER BY METRIC_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO R_MODEL_METRIC_T (MODEL_ID, METRIC_CODE) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{metricCode})
